person.name: John Gaynsford IV
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
In 1439 John Gaynsford acquired Hampton Poyle, Oxfordshire and properties in Surrey and Sussex, following the death of Robert Warner. In 1440, he bought the manor of Poyle, Stanwell, Middlesex, and associated properties in Middlesex and Buckinghamshire.

In 1447 John granted Hampton Poyle, Oxfordshire to his son John and John's wife Katherine.

John Gaynsford died on 9 July 1450. His will, dated 12 November 1448 and proved 9 November 1450, requested burial in the church of Crowhurst, Surrey, and names his three sons, John, William and Nicholas, as executors; also named, as a legatee, is William's daughter Elizabeth.

zh.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV是John Gaynsford III和Mrs. John Gaynsford的兒子，於大約1394年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞可洛爾斯特。他於大約1418年與Margaret Swanson在英國英格蘭素瑞可洛爾斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年7月19日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞可洛爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV是John Gaynsford III和Mrs. John Gaynsford的儿子，于大约1394年出生在英国英格兰素瑞可洛爾斯特。他于大约1418年与Margaret Swanson在英国英格兰素瑞可洛爾斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年7月19日在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞可洛爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV was born about 1394, in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Gaynsford III and Mrs. John Gaynsford. He married Margaret Swanson about 1418, in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 July 1450, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV est né environ 1394, à Crowhurst, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Gaynsford III et Mrs. John Gaynsford. Il a épousé Margaret Swanson environ 1418, à Crowhurst, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Crowhurst, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV wurde um 1394 in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Gaynsford III und Mrs. John Gaynsford geboren. Er hat um 1418 in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Margaret Swanson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1450 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV è nato il circa 1394 nel Crowhurst, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Gaynsford III e Mrs. John Gaynsford. Lui sposato Margaret Swanson circa 1418, nel Crowhurst, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 luglio 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Crowhurst, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IVは約1394年にイギリスイギリススリークロウウルストでJohn Gaynsford IIIとMrs. John Gaynsfordの息子として生まれた。約1418年にイギリスイギリススリークロウウルストでMargaret Swansonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年7月19日に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリークロウウルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV(은)는 대략 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 크로화르스트에서 John Gaynsford III(와)과 Mrs. John Gaynsford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 크로화르스트에서 Margaret Swanson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 7월 19일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 크로화르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV nasceu aproximadamente 1394, em Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Gaynsford III e Mrs. John Gaynsford. Ele casou-se com Margaret Swanson aproximadamente 1418, em Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV родился около 1394 г. в местности кроухурст, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Gaynsford III и Mrs. John Gaynsford. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Swanson около 1418 г. в местности кроухурст, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июля 1450 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности кроухурст, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: John Gaynsford IV nació aproximadamente 1394, en Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Gaynsford III y Mrs. John Gaynsford. Se casó con Margaret Swanson aproximadamente 1418, en Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de julio de 1450, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
